title: Monetize the MCP retriever: introduce the paid plan + gate the agent-facing retrieval surface
reason: P15 ships the agent-facing MCP retriever surface free/ungated (replacing dropped D6, which conflated the endpoint with charging for it). The billing/plan-gating step is a business decision not taken yet; the P11 usage-event metering already provides the substrate.
trigger: operator decides to introduce the paid plan
